behavior_summary: GHOST::look runs when an actor 'looks' at a ghost. It marks the target with info and process-exclude flags and causes the relevant process to emit the short label "ghost ".

The routine uses the triggering process id (inferred from BP+06h) as the context for Item::bark, allocates a temporary string "ghost ", calls Item::bark(pid, "ghost "), frees the temporary string, inspects the bark return value, then suspends/returns.

Overall effect at gameplay level: provide the player (or other inspecting process) with the visible/audible description of a ghost and mark the ghost object so it won't be reprocessed or will show info-state.
notable_control_flow: Entry on Event 0 / U8P_GHOST::look (treated as an area-entry style trigger).
Set object info and process-exclude flags immediately on entry (guarding further processing).
Allocate/push a short literal string "ghost ", convert to pointer and call external Item::bark in the inspector's process context.

After Item::bark returns, free the temporary string, push the return value, perform an implies/pop style check and then suspend/return — the bark return value is inspected to influence flow (exact effect inferred).
open_questions: Exact encoding and semantics of the 'info' write performed by the handler (which info id/value is set is not explicit).
Precise identity and semantics of BP+06h (inferred as the triggering process/pid) — this is very likely but not byte-level proven here.
What the implies/pop sequence does with the Item::bark return value (control-flow or interrupt handling) and whether any side effects depend on that value.

main_function.name: U8P_GHOST::look
main_function.purpose: Respond to the 'U8P_GHOST::look' (examine) event for a ghost: mark the ghost with info/exclusion state and make the inspecting process emit/display the label "ghost ".
entry_conditions: Event 0 (U8P_GHOST::look) triggered when an actor inspects the ghost
Fast-area/trigger region entry semantics apply (function runs on U8P_GHOST::look/area-enter)

function_map.name: U8P_GHOST::look
function_map.role: Event handler for the 'U8P_GHOST::look' action on a ghost; coordinates state writes and a descriptive bark to the inspecting process.

external_calls.purpose: Cause the inspecting process (pid inferred from BP+06h) to emit/display the short description string "ghost ".

writes.name: info
writes.likely_effect: Set a display/inspection info-state on the ghost object so that it records being looked-at or changes how it is presented.

writes.name: process exclude
writes.likely_effect: Mark the object as excluded from normal processing (prevents further AI/processing until cleared or permanently), likely to avoid repeated handling immediately after U8P_GHOST::look.

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: GHOST::look runs when an actor 'looks' at a ghost. It marks the target with info and process-exclude flags and causes the relevant process to emit the short label "ghost ".
